raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Rolling Stones,’ by Bob Spitz
description: The music journalist Bob Spitz, a keeper of numerous rock ’n’ roll flames, has turned out a colorful and authoritative new take on a much-documented band.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Small Town Girls,’ by Jayne Anne Phillips
book_title: ‘Small Town Girls,’ by Jayne Anne Phillips
description: A new book by Jayne Anne Phillips, a Pulitzer-winning novelist, recalling her childhood is a bittersweet triumph.
